While I generally prefer to let things go to avoid tension, the importance of acknowledging contributions and maintaining integrity makes it difficult to completely let it go. Therefore, I would place the marker slightly closer to the middle of the spectrum, acknowledging the importance of fairness while also recognizing the value of maintaining a harmonious work environment.
